form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Pukekohe on April 1 over 1400m, on heavy track; 2.75 len behind Starclan carrying 56kg at $7.50. The start before that held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at this track on March 11 over 1400m, slow going 3 len behind Rocky Marciano carrying 56kg at $3.60. Best form stacks up nicely and deserves another chance.

Capable of fighting out the finish again.
